Disney Parks Blog.title: New Enchantment Nighttime Spectacle Coming to Magic Kingdom
Disney Parks Blog.summary: Disney announced a brand new nighttime spectacle coming to Magic Kingdom featuring cutting-edge projection technology and beloved Disney characters.

Disney Parks Blog.title: Spring Dining Experiences at Walt Disney World
Disney Parks Blog.summary: Discover new spring-inspired dining experiences across all four Walt Disney World parks, featuring fresh ingredients and seasonal flavors.

Disney Parks Blog.title: Mickey & Minnie's Runaway Railway Celebrates One Year
Disney Parks Blog.summary: Celebrate one year of fun at Mickey & Minnie's Runaway Railway with special merchandise and limited-time treats.

The Disney Food Blog.title: Best Hidden Gem Restaurants at Walt Disney World
The Disney Food Blog.summary: Explore lesser-known dining locations that offer incredible food and shorter wait times across Walt Disney World.

The Disney Food Blog.title: Copycat Recipe: Dole Whip from Aloha Isle
The Disney Food Blog.summary: Make the famous Dole Whip at home with this easy copycat recipe that tastes just like the original from Epcot.

Universal Blog.title: Wizarding World of Harry Potter: New Attractions Coming Soon
Universal Blog.summary: Universal Orlando announces exciting new attractions coming to The Wizarding World of Harry Potter in the coming months.

Universal Blog.title: Epic Universe Opening Date Announced
Universal Blog.summary: Mark your calendars! Epic Universe, Universal's brand new theme park, will open to the public this summer with incredible new lands and attractions.
